basic_details.job_title: THSTI Senior Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI)

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit for Senior Manager: 50 years. Age Relaxation: PwBD (UR): 10 years Government servants: 5 years (with 3 years continuous service) Ex-servicemen (ESM): 5 years (with 5 years military service) THSTI and Departmental candidates: Up to 5 years for existing employees of THSTI and employees of the Department of Biotechnology. Not applicable to employees of THSTI and DBT who completed 5 years of service as on 20th February 2020.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate/PG Degree in HR/Finance or equivalent/CA/ICWA with 15 years of supervisory post-qualification experience.
qualification.details: Senior Manager: Graduate/PG Degree in HR/Finance or equivalent/CA/ICWA with fifteen (15) years of supervisory post-qualification experience in Central Government/autonomous body/university.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the THSTI Senior Manager Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of THSTI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download THSTI Senior Manager Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the THSTI Senior Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the THSTI Senior Manager post is 20 June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Manager post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Graduate/PG Degree in HR/Finance or equivalent, or be a CA/ICWA. Additionally, 15 years of supervisory post-qualification experience in Central Government, autonomous bodies, or universities is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Manager position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for direct recruitment is 50 years, and for deputation, it is 56 years. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Manager post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will be placed in Pay Matrix Level 13, with a salary ranging from Rs. 1,23,100 to Rs. 2,15,900/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the THSTI Senior Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official THSTI website. The application process involves filling in details, uploading documents, and paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the THSTI Senior Manager post?
faq.answer: Yes, General, OBC, and EWS candidates need to pay Rs 590/-. Candidates from abroad with OCI status in these categories will pay USD $30.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Senior Manager post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Senior Manager post announced in this recruitment drive by THSTI.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of selection for the Senior Manager position?
faq.answer: The selection process may include a written test, skill test, or interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside India apply for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, General, OBC, and EWS candidates from abroad with OCI Status can apply, and they will have to pay USD $30 as the application fee.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
